chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4411 of 2024 Abdul Samad Versus Government of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA 25762/24 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 07.03.2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Qureshi for petitioner. Mr. K.A. Wasvani, Assistant Advocate General. -.-.- Main grievance of the petitioner is that he was not called for interview. However, under the law he had seven days to appeal against such order dated 14.05.2024 and he failed to avail the remedy. The result of the test for the post of DSP was announced on 23.04.2024 and it appears that the interviews were conducted and appointments were recommended. As such at this stage there is no remedy, which is available to the petitioner under the law as he has failed to avail appropriate remedy within time. So this being the case petition is dismissed along with listed application. Head of Const. Benches Judge
